scenes.visualDesc: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET, FRONT VIEW, full body: a TINY newly-hatched baby DUCKLING standing on a plain warm cream studio background (no scenery, no props, soft even lighting). Soft bright LEMON-YELLOW down feathers all over, a small flat ORANGE DUCK BILL (wide and flat, clearly NOT a pointy chicken beak), one slightly damp little tuft of down sticking straight up on top of the head, EXTRA-LARGE round shiny very dark brown eyes with big bright reflective baby catch-lights, tiny orange WEBBED feet, NO accessories of any kind (no hat, no scarf, no glasses, no red comb), round baby tummy, oversized head, Pixar/Illumination 3D cartoon proportions, dense ultra-soft fluffy down. Facing the camera directly, wings slightly out for balance, wobbly happy stance.
scenes.cameraFraming: full-body character reference, front view, eye level, plain background

scenes.visualDesc: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET, THREE-QUARTER VIEW, full body: the EXACT SAME tiny newly-hatched baby DUCKLING as the front view, identical in every detail, on the same plain warm cream studio background (no scenery, no props, soft even lighting). Soft bright LEMON-YELLOW down, small flat ORANGE DUCK BILL (wide and flat, not pointy), one upright damp head-tuft, EXTRA-LARGE round very dark brown eyes with big baby catch-lights, tiny orange WEBBED feet, NO accessories (no hat, no scarf, no glasses, no red comb), round baby tummy, oversized head, Pixar/Illumination 3D cartoon proportions. Body turned three-quarters to the left, head turned toward camera with a curious blink.
scenes.cameraFraming: full-body character reference, three-quarter view, eye level, plain background

scenes.visualDesc: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET, SIDE PROFILE VIEW, full body: the EXACT SAME tiny newly-hatched baby DUCKLING as the front view, identical in every detail, on the same plain warm cream studio background (no scenery, no props, soft even lighting). Soft bright LEMON-YELLOW down, small flat ORANGE DUCK BILL in clear profile (wide flat duck bill silhouette), one upright damp head-tuft, EXTRA-LARGE round very dark brown eye with big baby catch-light, tiny orange WEBBED feet, NO accessories (no hat, no scarf, no glasses, no red comb), round baby tummy, oversized head, Pixar/Illumination 3D cartoon proportions. Full side profile facing left, mid-waddle with one webbed foot lifted.
scenes.cameraFraming: full-body character reference, side profile, eye level, plain background
